title: Vanilla Melee Starter Path
author: TerraPath Team
summary: A tiny example guide that demonstrates TerraPath progression stages, boss references, and categorized item picks.

stages.title: First Night
stages.description: Collect basic mobility, find surface chests, and prepare a safe arena before fighting early bosses.

subStages.title: Before Eye of Cthulhu
subStages.description: Focus on movement, a simple arena, and one reliable early melee option.
